tailoring_notes: Mirrored Meta JD vocabulary: 'cross-functional,' '0→1,' 'product roadmap,' 'user research,' 'discovery,' 'prioritization,' and 'adoption' appear throughout.

Dropped weakest bullets per role to reduce total line count and eliminate overflow; every remaining bullet targets PM signal Meta looks for: impact, user empathy, data-driven decisions, and cross-org influence.
Tightened phrasing across all roles to keep bullets at 2 visual lines max while preserving quantified outcomes and substantive scope.
